toolSpec.name: ListAHOWorkflows
toolSpec.description: List available HealthOmics workflows.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return

next_token.description: Token for pagination from a previous response

toolSpec.name: CreateAHOWorkflow
toolSpec.description: Create a new HealthOmics workflow.

definition_zip_base64.description: Base64-encoded workflow definition ZIP file. Cannot be used together with definition_uri or definition_repository

parameter_template.description: Optional parameter template for the workflow

container_registry_map.description: Optional container registry map with registryMappings (upstreamRegistryUrl, ecrRepositoryPrefix, upstreamRepositoryPrefix, ecrAccountId) and imageMappings (sourceImage, destinationImage) arrays

container_registry_map_uri.description: Optional S3 URI pointing to a JSON file containing container registry mappings. Cannot be used together with container_registry_map

definition_uri.description: S3 URI of the workflow definition ZIP file. Cannot be used together with definition_zip_base64 or definition_repository

path_to_main.description: Path to the main file in the workflow definition ZIP file. Not required if there is a top level main.wdl, main.cwl or main.nf files in the workflow package. Not required if there is only a single top level workflow file.

readme.description: README documentation: markdown content, local .md file path, or S3 URI (s3://bucket/key)

definition_repository.description: Git repository configuration with connection_arn, full_repository_id, source_reference (type and value), and optional exclude_file_patterns. Cannot be used together with definition_zip_base64 or definition_uri

parameter_template_path.description: Path to parameter template JSON file within the repository (only valid with definition_repository)

readme_path.description: Path to README markdown file within the repository (only valid with definition_repository)

toolSpec.name: GetAHOWorkflow
toolSpec.description: Get details about a specific workflow.

workflow_id.description: ID of the workflow to retrieve

export_definition.description: Whether to include a presigned URL for downloading the workflow definition ZIP file

toolSpec.name: CreateAHOWorkflowVersion
toolSpec.description: Create a new version of an existing workflow.

definition_zip_base64.description: Base64-encoded workflow definition ZIP file. Cannot be used together with definition_uri or definition_repository

description.description: Optional description of the workflow version

parameter_template.description: Optional parameter template for the workflow

storage_capacity.description: Storage capacity in GB (required for STATIC)

container_registry_map.description: Optional container registry map with registryMappings (upstreamRegistryUrl, ecrRepositoryPrefix, upstreamRepositoryPrefix, ecrAccountId) and imageMappings (sourceImage, destinationImage) arrays

container_registry_map_uri.description: Optional S3 URI pointing to a JSON file containing container registry mappings. Cannot be used together with container_registry_map

definition_uri.description: S3 URI of the workflow definition ZIP file. Cannot be used together with definition_zip_base64 or definition_repository

path_to_main.description: Path to the main file in the workflow definition ZIP file. Not required if there is a top level main.wdl, main.cwl or main.nf files in the workflow package. Not required if there is only a single top level workflow file.

readme.description: README documentation: markdown content, local .md file path, or S3 URI (s3://bucket/key)

definition_repository.description: Git repository configuration with connection_arn, full_repository_id, source_reference (type and value), and optional exclude_file_patterns. Cannot be used together with definition_zip_base64 or definition_uri

parameter_template_path.description: Path to parameter template JSON file within the repository (only valid with definition_repository)

readme_path.description: Path to README markdown file within the repository (only valid with definition_repository)

toolSpec.name: ListAHOWorkflowVersions
toolSpec.description: List versions of a workflow.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return

next_token.description: Token for pagination from a previous response

toolSpec.name: StartAHORun
toolSpec.description: Start a workflow run.

workflow_id.description: ID of the workflow to run

role_arn.description: ARN of the IAM role to use for the run

output_uri.description: S3 URI for the run outputs

parameters.description:
Parameters for the workflow. Parameter names must match one of the keys in the workflow's parameter template.
       All non-optional parameters must be present, if they are not provided the workflow run will not start. No other parameter names are allowed.
       The descriptions of the parameters in the parameter template may provide clues to the type of the parameter. It may be
       necessary to inspect the workflow definition to determine the appropriate parameter type.

storage_type.description: Storage type (STATIC or DYNAMIC). DYNAMIC is preferred except for runs with very large inputs (TiBs).

storage_capacity.description: Storage capacity in GB (required for STATIC). Storage is allocated in 1200 GiB chunks

cache_id.description: Optional ID of a run cache to use

run_group_id.description: Optional ID of a run group to associate with this run

toolSpec.name: ListAHORuns
toolSpec.description: List workflow runs.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return

next_token.description: Token for pagination from a previous response

created_after.description: Filter for runs created after this timestamp (ISO format)

created_before.description: Filter for runs created before this timestamp (ISO format)

run_group_id.description: Optional run group ID to filter runs

toolSpec.name: GetAHORun
toolSpec.description: Get details about a specific run.

run_id.description: ID of the run to retrieve

toolSpec.name: ListAHORunTasks
toolSpec.description: List tasks for a specific run.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return

next_token.description: Token for pagination from a previous response

toolSpec.name: GetAHORunTask
toolSpec.description: Get details about a specific task.

toolSpec.name: CreateAHORunGroup
toolSpec.description: Create a new HealthOmics run group.

name.description: Name for the run group (1-128 characters)

max_cpus.description: Maximum CPUs for the run group (1-100000)

max_gpus.description: Maximum GPUs for the run group (1-100000)

tags.description: Tags to apply to the run group

toolSpec.name: GetAHORunGroup
toolSpec.description: Get details of a specific HealthOmics run group.

run_group_id.description: ID of the run group to retrieve

toolSpec.name: ListAHORunGroups
toolSpec.description: List HealthOmics run groups.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return

next_token.description: Token for pagination from a previous response

toolSpec.name: UpdateAHORunGroup
toolSpec.description: Update an existing HealthOmics run group.

run_group_id.description: ID of the run group to update

name.description: New name for the run group

toolSpec.name: CreateAHORunCache
toolSpec.description: Create a new HealthOmics run cache.

cache_s3_location.description: S3 URI for cache storage (e.g., s3://bucket/prefix)

tags.description: Tags to apply to the run cache

cache_bucket_owner_id.description: AWS account ID of the S3 bucket owner for cross-account access

toolSpec.name: GetAHORunCache
toolSpec.description: Get details of a specific HealthOmics run cache.

cache_id.description: ID of the run cache to retrieve

toolSpec.name: ListAHORunCaches
toolSpec.description: List HealthOmics run caches.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return

next_token.description: Token for pagination from a previous response

toolSpec.name: UpdateAHORunCache
toolSpec.description: Update an existing HealthOmics run cache.

cache_id.description: ID of the run cache to update

name.description: New name for the run cache

description.description: New description for the run cache

toolSpec.name: GetAHORunLogs
toolSpec.description: Retrieve high-level run logs that show workflow execution events.

start_time.description: Optional start time for log retrieval (ISO format)

end_time.description: Optional end time for log retrieval (ISO format)

limit.description: Maximum number of log events to return

next_token.description: Token for pagination from a previous response

start_from_head.description: Whether to start from the beginning (True) or end (False) of the log stream

toolSpec.name: GetAHORunManifestLogs
toolSpec.description: Retrieve run manifest logs produced when a workflow completes or fails.

start_time.description: Optional start time for log retrieval (ISO format)

end_time.description: Optional end time for log retrieval (ISO format)

limit.description: Maximum number of log events to return

next_token.description: Token for pagination from a previous response

start_from_head.description: Whether to start from the beginning (True) or end (False) of the log stream

toolSpec.name: GetAHORunEngineLogs
toolSpec.description: Retrieve engine logs containing STDOUT and STDERR from the workflow engine process.

start_time.description: Optional start time for log retrieval (ISO format)

end_time.description: Optional end time for log retrieval (ISO format)

limit.description: Maximum number of log events to return

next_token.description: Token for pagination from a previous response

start_from_head.description: Whether to start from the beginning (True) or end (False) of the log stream

toolSpec.name: GetAHOTaskLogs
toolSpec.description: Retrieve logs for a specific workflow task containing STDOUT and STDERR.

start_time.description: Optional start time for log retrieval (ISO format)

end_time.description: Optional end time for log retrieval (ISO format)

limit.description: Maximum number of log events to return

next_token.description: Token for pagination from a previous response

start_from_head.description: Whether to start from the beginning (True) or end (False) of the log stream

toolSpec.name: AnalyzeAHORunPerformance
toolSpec.description: Analyze AWS HealthOmics workflow run performance and provide optimization recommendations.

run_ids.description: List of run IDs to analyze for resource optimization. Can be provided as a JSON array string like ["run1", "run2"] or as a comma-separated string like "run1,run2"

headroom.description: Headroom percentage for instance recommendations (0.0 to 1.0). Default is 0.20 (20%). This adds a buffer to recommended instance sizes to prevent over-optimization. Set this value to 0 for aggressive optimization

detailed.description: Include very detailed task metrics in the report. Typically this is only required for granular analysis and can consume a large number of tokens in the agents context window. Default is False.

toolSpec.name: GenerateAHORunTimeline
toolSpec.description: Generate a Gantt-style timeline visualization for an AWS HealthOmics workflow run.

run_id.description: The run ID to generate timeline for.

time_unit.description: Time unit for the timeline axis. Valid values: sec, min, hr, day. Defaults to hr.

region.description: AWS region for pricing lookups. Defaults to us-east-1.

output_format.description: Output format for the SVG. Valid values: svg (raw SVG string), base64 (base64-encoded SVG for easier extraction). Defaults to base64.

toolSpec.name: DiagnoseAHORunFailure
toolSpec.description: Provides comprehensive diagnostic information for a failed workflow run.

detailed.description: If False, excludes manifest logs and limits engine/task logs to last 50 lines from 15 minutes before stop time to 5 minutes after. If True, includes all logs. False is suitable for most scenarios

toolSpec.name: LintAHOWorkflowDefinition
toolSpec.description: Lint WDL or CWL workflow definitions and return validation findings.

workflow_content.description: The workflow definition content to lint

toolSpec.name: LintAHOWorkflowBundle
toolSpec.description: Lint multi-file WDL or CWL workflow bundles and return validation findings.

workflow_files.description: Dictionary mapping file paths to their content

main_workflow_file.description: Path to the main workflow file within the bundle

toolSpec.name: SearchGenomicsFiles
toolSpec.description: Search for genomics files across S3 buckets, HealthOmics sequence stores, and reference stores.

file_type.description: Optional file type filter. Valid types: fastq, fasta, fna, bam, cram, sam, vcf, gvcf, bcf, bed, gff, bai, crai, fai, dict, tbi, csi, bwa_amb, bwa_ann, bwa_bwt, bwa_pac, bwa_sa

search_terms.description: List of search terms to match against file paths, tags and metadata. If empty, returns all files of the specified file type.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return (1-10000)

include_associated_files.description: Whether to include associated files (e.g., BAM index files, FASTQ pairs) in the results

offset.description: Number of results to skip for pagination (0-based offset), ignored if enable_storage_pagination is true

continuation_token.description: Continuation token from previous search response for paginated results

enable_storage_pagination.description: Enable efficient storage-level pagination for large datasets (recommended for >1000 results)

pagination_buffer_size.description: Buffer size for storage-level pagination (100-50000). Larger values improve ranking accuracy but use more memory.

adhoc_s3_buckets.description: Optional list of additional S3 bucket paths to search (e.g., ["s3://bucket-name/prefix/"]). These buckets will be searched in addition to any configured buckets, allowing you to search buckets that are not part of the standard configuration. Maximum 50 bucket paths.

toolSpec.name: GetSupportedFileTypes
toolSpec.description: Get information about supported genomics file types.

toolSpec.name: PackageAHOWorkflow
toolSpec.description: Package workflow definition files into a base64-encoded ZIP.

main_file_content.description: Content of the main workflow file

main_file_name.description: Name of the main workflow file

toolSpec.name: GetAHOSupportedRegions
toolSpec.description: Get the list of AWS regions where HealthOmics is available.

toolSpec.name: ListCodeConnections
toolSpec.description: List available CodeConnections.

provider_type_filter.description: Filter by provider type: Bitbucket, GitHub, GitHubEnterpriseServer, GitLab, GitLabSelfManaged

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return

next_token.description: Token for pagination from a previous response

toolSpec.name: CreateCodeConnection
toolSpec.description: Create a new CodeConnection.

provider_type.description: Git provider type: Bitbucket, GitHub, GitHubEnterpriseServer, GitLab, GitLabSelfManaged

tags.description: Optional tags to apply to the connection

toolSpec.name: GetCodeConnection
toolSpec.description: Get details about a specific CodeConnection.

connection_arn.description: ARN of the connection to retrieve

toolSpec.name: ListECRRepositories
toolSpec.description: List ECR repositories with HealthOmics accessibility status.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return

next_token.description: Pagination token from a previous response

filter_healthomics_accessible.description: Only return repositories accessible by HealthOmics

toolSpec.name: CheckContainerAvailability
toolSpec.description: Check if a container image is available in ECR and accessible by HealthOmics.

image_digest.description: Image digest (sha256:...) - if provided, takes precedence over tag

initiate_pull_through.description: If True and the image is not found in a pull-through cache repository that is accessible to HealthOmics, attempt to initiate the pull-through using batch_get_image API call

toolSpec.name: CloneContainerToECR
toolSpec.description: Clone a container image to a private ECR repository for HealthOmics use.

target_repository_name.description: Target ECR repository name. Only used if no pull-through cache exists. If not provided, derives from source image.

target_image_tag.description: Target image tag. If not provided, uses source tag or "latest".

toolSpec.name: GrantHealthOmicsRepositoryAccess
toolSpec.description: Grant HealthOmics access to an ECR repository.

repository_name.description: ECR repository name to grant HealthOmics access to

toolSpec.name: ListPullThroughCacheRules
toolSpec.description: List pull-through cache rules with HealthOmics usability status.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return

next_token.description: Pagination token from a previous response

toolSpec.name: CreatePullThroughCacheForHealthOmics
toolSpec.description: Create a pull-through cache rule configured for HealthOmics.

upstream_registry.description: Upstream registry type: docker-hub, quay, or ecr-public

ecr_repository_prefix.description: ECR repository prefix (defaults to registry type name)

credential_arn.description: Secrets Manager ARN for registry credentials (required for docker-hub)

toolSpec.name: CreateContainerRegistryMap
toolSpec.description: Create a container registry map for HealthOmics workflows.

ecr_account_id.description: AWS account ID for ECR repositories. If not provided, uses the current AWS account.

ecr_region.description: AWS region for ECR repositories. If not provided, uses the current configured region.

include_pull_through_caches.description: If true, automatically discovers HealthOmics-usable ECR pull-through cache rules and creates registry mappings for them.

additional_registry_mappings.description: Additional registry mappings to include beyond discovered pull-through caches. Each mapping has 'upstreamRegistryUrl' and 'ecrRepositoryPrefix'.

image_mappings.description: List of specific image mappings for container overrides. Each mapping has 'sourceImage' and 'destinationImage'. These take precedence over registry mappings.

output_format.description: Output format: 'json' for raw JSON string, 'dict' for Python dictionary

toolSpec.name: ValidateHealthOmicsECRConfig
toolSpec.description: Validate ECR configuration for HealthOmics workflows.

toolSpec.name: CreateAHOSequenceStore
toolSpec.description: Create a new HealthOmics sequence store.

name.description: Name for the new sequence store

description.description: Optional description for the sequence store

sse_kms_key_arn.description: KMS key ARN for server-side encryption of the sequence store

fallback_location.description: S3 URI for the fallback location of the sequence store

tags.description: Tags to apply to the sequence store as a JSON string or object, e.g. {"key": "value"}

toolSpec.name: ListAHOSequenceStores
toolSpec.description: List HealthOmics sequence stores.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return

next_token.description: Token for pagination from a previous response

toolSpec.name: GetAHOSequenceStore
toolSpec.description: Get details about a specific HealthOmics sequence store.

sequence_store_id.description: The ID of the sequence store

toolSpec.description: Update a HealthOmics sequence store.

sequence_store_id.description: The ID of the sequence store to update

name.description: New name for the sequence store

description.description: New description for the sequence store

fallback_location.description: New S3 URI for the fallback location

toolSpec.name: ListAHOReadSets
toolSpec.description: List read sets in a HealthOmics sequence store with optional filtering.

sequence_store_id.description: The ID of the sequence store

status.description: Filter by read set status (e.g., ACTIVE, ARCHIVED)

file_type.description: Filter by file type (FASTQ, BAM, CRAM, or UBAM)

created_after.description: Filter for read sets created after this ISO 8601 datetime

created_before.description: Filter for read sets created before this ISO 8601 datetime

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return

next_token.description: Token for pagination from a previous response

toolSpec.name: GetAHOReadSetMetadata
toolSpec.description: Get metadata for a specific read set in a HealthOmics sequence store.

sequence_store_id.description: The ID of the sequence store

read_set_id.description: The ID of the read set

toolSpec.name: StartAHOReadSetImportJob
toolSpec.description: Start a read set import job to import genomic files from S3 into a sequence store.

sequence_store_id.description: The ID of the sequence store

role_arn.description: IAM role ARN for the import job

sources.description: JSON list of import sources. Each source requires: sourceFileType (FASTQ|BAM|CRAM|UBAM), sourceFiles (object with source1 required, source2 optional for paired-end FASTQ), subjectId, sampleId. Optional fields: referenceArn, name, description, generatedFrom, tags. Example: [{"sourceFileType": "FASTQ", "sourceFiles": {"source1": "s3://bucket/sample_R1.fastq.gz", "source2": "s3://bucket/sample_R2.fastq.gz"}, "subjectId": "subject-1", "sampleId": "sample-1", "referenceArn": "arn:aws:omics:us-east-1:123456789012:referenceStore/123/reference/456", "name": "my-reads"}]

tags.description: Tags to apply to the import job as a JSON string or object, e.g. {"key": "value"}

toolSpec.name: GetAHOReadSetImportJob
toolSpec.description: Get details about a read set import job.

sequence_store_id.description: The ID of the sequence store

import_job_id.description: The ID of the import job

toolSpec.name: ListAHOReadSetImportJobs
toolSpec.description: List read set import jobs for a sequence store.

sequence_store_id.description: The ID of the sequence store

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return

next_token.description: Token for pagination from a previous response

toolSpec.name: StartAHOReadSetExportJob
toolSpec.description: Start a read set export job to export read sets from a sequence store to S3.

sequence_store_id.description: The ID of the sequence store

destination_s3_uri.description: S3 URI for the export destination

role_arn.description: IAM role ARN for the export job

read_set_ids.description: List of read set IDs to export as a JSON list or array, e.g. ["id1", "id2"]

toolSpec.name: GetAHOReadSetExportJob
toolSpec.description: Get details about a read set export job.

sequence_store_id.description: The ID of the sequence store

export_job_id.description: The ID of the export job

toolSpec.name: ListAHOReadSetExportJobs
toolSpec.description: List read set export jobs for a sequence store.

sequence_store_id.description: The ID of the sequence store

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return

next_token.description: Token for pagination from a previous response

toolSpec.name: ActivateAHOReadSets
toolSpec.description: Activate archived read sets in a HealthOmics sequence store.

sequence_store_id.description: The ID of the sequence store

read_set_ids.description: List of read set IDs to activate as a JSON list or array, e.g. ["id1", "id2"]

toolSpec.name: ListAHOReferenceStores
toolSpec.description: List HealthOmics reference stores.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return

next_token.description: Token for pagination from a previous response

toolSpec.name: GetAHOReferenceStore
toolSpec.description: Get details about a specific HealthOmics reference store.

reference_store_id.description: The ID of the reference store. If not provided, auto-resolves the single store in the account/region.

toolSpec.name: ListAHOReferences
toolSpec.description: List references in a HealthOmics reference store with optional filtering.

reference_store_id.description: The ID of the reference store. If not provided, auto-resolves the single store in the account/region.

status_filter.description: Filter references by status (e.g., ACTIVE, DELETING)

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return

next_token.description: Token for pagination from a previous response

toolSpec.name: GetAHOReferenceMetadata
toolSpec.description: Get metadata for a specific reference in a HealthOmics reference store.

reference_store_id.description: The ID of the reference store. If not provided, auto-resolves the single store in the account/region.

toolSpec.name: StartAHOReferenceImportJob
toolSpec.description: Start a reference import job to import reference files from S3 into a reference store.

role_arn.description: IAM role ARN for the import job

sources.description: JSON list of import sources. Each source requires: sourceFile (S3 URI to a FASTA reference file), name. Optional fields: description, tags. Example: [{"sourceFile": "s3://bucket/GRCh38.fasta", "name": "GRCh38", "description": "Human reference genome build 38", "tags": {"build": "38", "species": "human"}}]

reference_store_id.description: The ID of the reference store. If not provided, auto-resolves the single store in the account/region.

toolSpec.name: GetAHOReferenceImportJob
toolSpec.description: Get details about a reference import job.

import_job_id.description: The ID of the import job

reference_store_id.description: The ID of the reference store. If not provided, auto-resolves the single store in the account/region.

toolSpec.name: ListAHOReferenceImportJobs
toolSpec.description: List reference import jobs for a reference store.

reference_store_id.description: The ID of the reference store. If not provided, auto-resolves the single store in the account/region.

max_results.description: Maximum number of results to return

next_token.description: Token for pagination from a previous response
